purpose: Priority source expansion register for books, editions, papers, archival collections, and patents requested for the Steinmetz archive.
quality_rule: A source can be registered as official before it is processed, but it cannot be cited as decoded until source custody, OCR/page mapping, and review state are visible.

records.title: On the Law of Hysteresis
records.why_it_matters: Foundational source for Steinmetz's hysteresis law, magnetic loss, and the later Steinmetz equation.
records.repo_action: Acquire a primary scan or publisher PDF, then OCR, page-map, extract equations and hysteresis diagrams, and promote only scan-checked claims.

records.title: Complex Quantities and Their Use in Electrical Engineering

authority_refs.value: Proceedings of the International Electrical Congress Held in Chicago, August 21-25, 1893, pp. 33-74.

records.why_it_matters: Flagship source for complex quantities, the symbolic method, and early phasor engineering.
records.repo_action: Acquire and verify against the Proceedings scan. Do not use Scribd or forum PDFs as custody copies until they match the primary proceedings.

records.title: Theory and Calculation of Alternating Current Phenomena
records.why_it_matters: Earliest book edition now separated for edition comparison.
records.repo_action: Scan-verify OCR chapter starts, compare with 1900 and 1916 editions, then promote symbolic-method deltas.

records.title: Theory and Calculation of Alternating Current Phenomena
records.why_it_matters: Early revised edition between the first edition and the later 1916 text.
records.repo_action: Use as the first edition-comparison layer for AC terminology and equations.

records.title: Theory and Calculation of Electric Circuits
records.why_it_matters: Distinct core source for circuit equations and calculation, not the same as Electric Apparatus.
records.repo_action: Promote circuit equation families after chapter map and equation OCR are reviewed.

records.title: Electric Discharges, Waves and Impulses
records.why_it_matters: Expanded transient lecture edition; strengthens waves, impulses, and lightning pages.
records.repo_action: Compare against the 1911 edition and promote changed or expanded transient passages.

records.title: Mechanical Forces in Magnetic Fields
records.why_it_matters: High-value source for force, stress, pressure, and tension language in magnetic fields.
records.repo_action: Acquire scan/PDF, then build the field-force dossier and keep ether-field readings labeled as interpretation.

records.title: The General Equations of the Electric Circuit
records.why_it_matters: Bridge between symbolic method, differential equations, transients, and general circuit theory.
records.repo_action: Acquire the article and link it to Electric Circuits and Transient Electric Phenomena.

records.title: The General Equations of the Electric Circuit-III
records.why_it_matters: Continuation of Steinmetz's general circuit equation program.
records.repo_action: Acquire together with the 1908 paper so the series can be decoded as a sequence.

records.title: Lightning Phenomena in Electric Circuits
records.why_it_matters: Primary lightning, surge, impulse, and high-voltage transient source.
records.repo_action: Acquire scan/PDF and feed the lightning-surges concept page, equation queue, and diagram archive.

records.title: Outline of Theory of Impulse Currents
records.why_it_matters: Direct source for impulse-current and surge mathematics.
records.repo_action: Acquire and decode after the expanded Electric Discharges edition is aligned.

records.title: Cable Charge and Discharge
records.why_it_matters: Distributed capacity, cable charge/discharge curves, and line-transient behavior.
records.repo_action: Acquire and connect to distributed constants, condenser charge, and traveling waves.

records.title: Frequency Conversion by Third Class Conductor and Mechanism of the Arcing Ground and Other Cumulative Surges
records.why_it_matters: Nonlinear discharge, arcing-ground, cumulative-surge, and frequency-conversion source.
records.repo_action: Acquire and make this a flagship surge/nonlinear-discharge decoding page.

records.title: The Future of Electricity
records.why_it_matters: Philosophical and forecasting source, useful for Steinmetz's civilizational reading of electricity.
records.repo_action: Acquire HathiTrust page images or an equivalent public scan before OCR seeding.

records.title: Systems of Electric Transmission and Distribution
records.why_it_matters: Compact source for power transmission, distribution, phase systems, and early AC system selection.
records.repo_action: Acquire page images or a text export, then process as a short source with transmission-system tags.

records.title: Steinmetz Electrical Engineering Library

authority_refs.value: Treat this as a multi-volume library/series until each volume is verified individually.

records.why_it_matters: May bundle important instructional material or compiled lecture content.
records.repo_action: Verify the catalog record, contents, authorship/editorial scope, and public-domain status before treating it as a Steinmetz source.

records.title: Charles Proteus Steinmetz Papers - Union College
records.why_it_matters: Potentially deepest source for writings, GE/publication drafts, notes, ledgers, and correspondence.
records.repo_action: Create archival request notes, rights notes, box/folder inventory, and scan intake protocol before public transcription.

records.title: Charles Proteus Steinmetz Collection - Carnegie Mellon University Archives
records.why_it_matters: Letters, photographs, and demonstration objects tied to Steinmetz and Four Lectures on Relativity and Space.
records.repo_action: Track as institutional archival material; do not mix letters or object metadata with published technical claims.

records.title: Steinmetz Patents Corpus
records.why_it_matters: The patent corpus is the practical apparatus counterpart to the books and articles.
records.repo_action: Expand the current patent register into a full patent-to-theory bridge with claims, drawings, citations, and concept links.

master_portals.portal: Online Books Page: Charles Proteus Steinmetz / source listings
master_portals.role: Authority map for HathiTrust and public scan trails.

master_portals.portal: Open Library author and work pages
master_portals.role: Edition checklist, Internet Archive identifiers, and public text/download trails.
Primary public OCR/PDF source for many public-domain books.
Library-grade edition verification and page images where access permits.
Authority trail for AIEE papers; access to PDFs still needs rights/access verification.
Archival source queue for manuscripts, notes, and institutional materials.
Fast patent discovery portal before full official patent-download normalization.

processing_gates: Raw scan/PDF/OCR stored or remote custody documented
Equation, figure, concept, glossary, quote, annotation, and crosslink candidates generated
Canonical public pages promoted only after review
